data.content:
All **8 tests pass**. Here's what was created in `tests/ServiceRegistryTests.cs`:

| Test | Assertion used | What it verifies |
|---|---|---|
| `Register_And_Resolve_Returns_RegisteredInstance` | `AreSame` | Registration + resolution returns the same instance |
| `Resolve_ReturnsNull_WhenServiceNotRegistered` | `IsNull` | Null for unregistered services |
| `ResolveRequired_Throws_WhenServiceNotRegistered` | `ThrowsException` | `ResolveRequired` throws `InvalidOperationException` |
| `Register_ThrowsArgumentNullException_WhenServiceIsNull` | `ThrowsException` | Null guard on `Register` |
| `Clear_RemovesAllServices` | `IsNull` + `CollectionAssert.AreEqual` | Clearing removes all services |
| `Remove_RemovesOnlyTargetedService` | `IsNull` + `AreSame` | Removal of one service leaves others intact |
| `Register_OverwritesPreviousRegistration` | `AreSame` / `AreNotSame` | Re-registration replaces previous instance |
| `GetAll_ReturnsAllRegisteredInstances` | `AreEqual` + `CollectionAssert.Contains` | `GetAll` returns all registered instances |

I also added `ImplicitUsings` and `Nullable` to both `.csproj` files — these were missing and required by the existing source code.
